Borla Cat-Back ATAK Exhaust System for the Ford Focus RS

Color
Regular price $1,649.99
Sale price $1,649.99 Regular price $1,847.99
Unit price /  per 

Ford Focus RS Cat-Back ATAK Exhaust System made by Borla

Bring a whole new exhaust note to your Ford Focus RS with this Cat-Back ATAK Exhaust System made by Borla! Made specifically for the Ford Focus RS so would this would be a direct bolt-on upgrade system thst is fully constructed out of stainless steel!

Featuring mandrel bent 3" and 2 1/4" exhaust piping followed with dual 4" Round Rolled Angle-Cut Tips that are available in either standard polished finish or a carbon fiber finish! The ATAK series is the more aggressive exhaust from Borla, developed for getting both noticeable power gains and great exhaust note.

Adding a more aggressive roar to your Ford Focus RS that any enthusiast will love!

Borla Ford Focus RS Cat-Back ATAK Exhaust System Features:

  • Designed to be a direct bolt-on upgrade system
  • Made specifically for the Ford Focus RS
  • Fully constructed out of stainless steel
  • Mandrel bent 3" & 2 1/4" exhaust piping
  • Dual 4" Round Rolled Angle-Cut Tips
  • All hardware and instructions included
